response: The primary objective of this document is to present the independent auditor's report and financial statements for the Development Bank of Ethiopia for the year ended 30 June 2023 [Source 1, page 2,3]. This includes consolidated and separate financial statements [Source 1, page 2,3]. The document covers various aspects, including the report of the board of management [Source 2, page 3], statement of profit or loss [Source 2, page 3], financial position [Source 2, page 3], changes in equity [Source 2, page 3], cash flows [Source 2, page 3] and notes to the financial statements [Source 2, page 3].
